login.tenantCodeTooltip: Novixa code for pharmacy or clinic — e.g. NT_XUANHOA, DEMO_CLINIC

messages.invalidResponse: Invalid API response — retry or restart the API.
messages.failed: Invalid organization code, username, or password
messages.formIncomplete: Please fill in all sign-in fields.

setup.subtitle: Pharmacy setup — {{product}}

firstDeploy.title: First deployment
firstDeploy.description: No pharmacies yet. Fill in the form below to create the first one — no platform setup key required.

existingTenants.title: {{count}} pharmacies on the system
existingTenants.description: Adding a new pharmacy requires the platform setup key (Platform__ProvisioningKey on the server).

setup.platformKeyTooltip: Platform__ProvisioningKey value on the API server
setup.tenantsEmpty: List not loaded — enter the platform key and click Load list.

organizations.subtitle: Manage registered organizations — {{product}}
organizations.introDetail: Grant packs by module SKU (allowed_modules). Apply a template then uncheck what was not purchased. System IAM is always included — not sold.
organizations.listHint: {{count}} organizations — open the list to assign module packs.

setup.tenantCodeTooltip: Used when signing in to admin and customer apps

chainInfo.title: First branch above (CN01 / Main counter)
chainInfo.description: Enter the number of extra branches and click «Add to form» — the system fills CN02, CN03… Admin is granted access to all branches.

setup.selectBranchCount: Choose a branch count greater than 0

entitlement.title: Entitlement — {{code}}
entitlement.intro: Apply a commercial pack template, then adjust SKUs. Parent = product pack, child = sellable module_code. System config is not included.
entitlement.packTemplateHint: Prefills vertical + SKU list — uncheck modules the customer did not buy.
entitlement.maxBranchesHint: Leave empty for unlimited. Example: customer buys 1 site → set 1. Lowering the ceiling does not delete existing branches.
entitlement.modulesTreeHint: Check a pack parent to select all its SKUs; only SKUs for the selected vertical are shown.
entitlement.noModulesForVertical: No SKUs available for this vertical in the registry.
entitlement.skuNote: Contracts should list module codes (e.g. novixa_connect), not UI tab names.
entitlement.needPlatformKey: Enter the platform setup key before configuring packs.

messages.loadTenantsFailed: Could not load organizations — check the platform key
messages.created: Created pharmacy {{code}}{{branches}}. Sign in with this code.
